title: maytenus somalensis
intro: Maytenus somalensis, also known as the Somalian maytenus, is a plant species within the Celastraceae family, commonly found in the tropical regions of East Africa. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including antimalarial, antibacterial, and anti-inflammatory activities. The health benefits associated with Maytenus somalensis include reducing fever, treating malaria and other infections, and alleviating pain and inflammation. Herbal preparations of the plant are usually made by boiling its roots or leaves in water, and it is also used in traditional medicine as a poultice or salve to treat various ailments.
